style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Charmander's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plating. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp, geometric shadows. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion, catching cold blue-white light that casts a sterile, industrial glow around the Pokémon. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
